title: P1: Check EvaluationResult.IsSuccess at call sites — add _consecutiveLlmEvalFailures counter
description: ILlmEvaluator.EvaluateAsync returns EvaluationResult with IsSuccess and FailureReason, but call sites only check ShouldReplan. Parse failures, provider errors, or null responses all return IsSuccess=false, ShouldReplan=false — indistinguishable from genuine 'continue' verdicts. Fix: check !evalResult.IsSuccess at call sites, increment _consecutiveLlmEvalFailures counter, log Error after 3 consecutive failures. Sprint 57 Wave D fixed this.
